channel.title: +Serpentes on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Serpentes on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Place mapping
item.description:
Handling tips

  • Do not attempt to handle snakes — even non‑venomous ones may bite defensively.
  • Call local rescuers if a snake enters your home; killing snakes is illegal under the Wildlife Protection Act.
  • Keep surroundings clean (remove garbage, rodent habitats) to reduce snake visits.
  • Be cautious during monsoon — snakes are more active when burrows flood.

Bengaluru

BBMP Wildlife Cell / Helpline: 080-2222 1188
Forest Department Helpline: 1926

Russels viper

ಕೊಳಕ ಮಂಡಲದ ಹಾವು. Russels viper. Venomous.
Checked body. Has a very flat, broadly triangular head that is significantly wider than its narrow neck, giving it an arrowhead appearance.
V-shaped or lambda-shaped marking on top of the head pointing toward the snout.
Features large, distinct oval or leaf-shaped spots.
